entities.name: PROTEOMES
entities.description: The entire set of proteins expressed by a genome, cells, tissues, or an organism at a certain time under certain conditions

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by living organisms such as pests, pathogens, and weeds

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by non-living factors such as drought, salinity, and temperature

entities.name: PROTEIN ABUNDANCES
entities.description: The quantity of proteins present in a cell or tissue

entities.name: CELLULAR LOCALIZATION
entities.description: The specific location of a protein within a cell

entities.name: POSTTRANSCRIPTIONAL MODIFICATIONS
entities.description: Changes made to RNA after transcription

entities.name: POSTTRANSLATIONAL MODIFICATIONS
entities.description: Chemical modifications of a protein after its translation

entities.name: PROTEIN INTERACTIONS
entities.description: Physical contacts established between two or more protein molecules

entities.name: PROTEIN BIOLOGICAL FUNCTIONS
entities.description: The specific biological roles and activities performed by proteins

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area

entities.name: GENE IDENTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of locating and characterizing specific genes within a genome

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism

entities.name: PROTEOMICS
entities.description: The large-scale study of proteins, particularly their structures and functions

entities.name: OMIC BRANCHES
entities.description: Various high-throughput biological technologies including genomics, proteomics, and metabolomics

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The use of living systems and organisms to develop or make products

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Efforts to enhance the genetic makeup of crops for better yield and stress tolerance

entities.name: OMIC DATABASES
entities.description: Digital repositories storing large-scale biological data from omic technologies

entities.name: PROTEOMIC PLATFORMS
entities.description: Technological systems used to analyze the proteome

entities.name: PLANT BIOTECHNOLOGY APPROACHES
entities.description: Techniques applied to plants to improve their characteristics using biotechnology

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: Multicellular eukaryotes of the kingdom Plantae
